assertions.text: status_card_present: Response contains the formatted box status card
assertions.evidence: Response contains a full ASCII box card with '║  SPREAD MONITOR — AAPL' header and double-line box drawing characters (╔, ╠, ╚, etc.)

assertions.text: zone_classified: Response clearly states one of the five zones
assertions.evidence: Card shows '║  Status:  🟢 SAFE ZONE' and assessment text says 'Zone assigned: SAFE ZONE'

assertions.text: safe_zone_for_aapl: Response classifies as SAFE ZONE given the large buffer between AAPL price and $185 short strike
assertions.evidence: AAPL at $247.99 is 25.4% above the $185 short strike; response classifies as SAFE ZONE with both buffer and loss% signals confirming.

assertions.text: shows_buffer_pct: Response shows the percentage buffer — should be notably large (>10%)
assertions.evidence: Card shows 'Short strike:  $185.00  (buffer: 25.4%)' — well above the >10% threshold. Assessment text confirms '25.4% above your $185 short strike'.

assertions.text: shows_pnl: Response shows current P&L, which should be positive (profit) given the comfortable buffer
assertions.evidence: Card shows 'Current P&L:   +$153.00  per contract' and 'Loss % of max: 0.0%'. Assessment states 'you've already locked in $1.53 per share ($153 per contract) — roughly 72.9% of your maximum possible profit'

assertions.text: actionable_guidance: Response gives zone-appropriate guidance for a healthy SAFE ZONE position
assertions.evidence: 'Suggested action: No action needed — let theta continue working for you.' with specific guidance on early close at 10–15 cents and a mental stop if AAPL drops below $210.
